Name: FRichCurveKey
Description: One key in a rich, editable float curve

Variables.Name: InterpMode
Variables.Description: Interpolation mode between this key and the next

Variables.Name: TangentMode
Variables.Description: Mode for tangents at this key

Variables.Name: TangentWeightMode
Variables.Description: If either tangent at this key is 'weighted'

Variables.Name: ArriveTangent
Variables.Description: If RCIM_Cubic, the arriving tangent at this key

Variables.Name: ArriveTangentWeight
Variables.Description: If RCTWM_WeightedArrive or RCTWM_WeightedBoth, the weight of the left tangent

Variables.Name: LeaveTangent
Variables.Description: If RCIM_Cubic, the leaving tangent at this key

Variables.Name: LeaveTangentWeight
Variables.Description: If RCTWM_WeightedLeave or RCTWM_WeightedBoth, the weight of the right tangent
